basics.description: **Note:** Please refer to the following before installing the solution: • Review the solution [Release Notes](https://github.com/trendmicro/TrendAI_Sentinel_public_data_Connector/releases) • There may be [known issues](https://github.com/trendmicro/TrendAI_Sentinel_public_data_Connector/issues) pertaining to this Solution. The [TrendAI Vision One](https://www.trendmicro.com/en_us/business/products/detection-response/xdr.html) solution for Microsoft Sentinel provides two data connectors that ingest security data from the TrendAI Vision One platform using the Codeless Connector Framework (CCF): - **Workbench Alerts** – Security incidents, investigations, and alerts with IOC extraction - **OAT Detections** – MITRE ATT&CK mapped detections with full process trees This solution also includes KQL parser functions, an analytic rule, and a workbook dashboard for Workbench Alerts. **Data Connectors:** 2, **Parsers:** 2, **Workbooks:** 1, **Analytic Rules:** 1 [Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel](https://aka.ms/azuresentinel) | [Learn more about Solutions](https://aka.ms/azuresentinelsolutionsdoc)

metadata.hidden: Hiding location, we get it from workspace

basics.name: getLAWorkspace
basics.toolTip: This filters by workspaces that exist in the Resource Group selected

basics.name: workspace
basics.label: Workspace
basics.toolTip: This dropdown will list only workspace that exists in the Resource Group selected

options.text: This Solution installs the following data connectors. You can manage these data connectors in the Configuration > Data Connectors blade after the solution is installed.

link.label: Learn more about connecting data sources

options.text:
The Solution installs 2 data connectors:

1. **TrendAI Vision One - Workbench Alerts** - Ingests security alerts from the Workbench API with IOC extraction and entity mapping.

2. **TrendAI Vision One - OAT Detections** - Ingests Observed Attack Techniques with full process trees and MITRE ATT&CK mappings.

elements.name: excludeThirdPartyOat
elements.label: Exclude third-party OAT detections (productCode == 'tlc')
elements.toolTip: When checked, the DCR transform drops rows where productCode == 'tlc' (third-party linked sources). Uncheck to ingest everything.

options.text: This solution installs workbook(s) to help you gain insights into the telemetry collected in Microsoft Sentinel. After installing the solution, start using the workbook in Manage solution view.
Visualize Workbench alerts over time, by severity, by detection model, and top affected hosts.
This solution installs the following analytic rule templates. After installing the solution, create and enable analytic rules in Manage solution view.

elements.name: analytic1
elements.label: TrendAI Vision One - Create Incident for Workbench Alerts

options.text: Creates an incident based on TrendAI Vision One Workbench Alerts and maps the impacted entities for Microsoft Sentinel usage.
